Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO WAYS AND MEANS
AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Authorizes the town of Minisink to impose a hotel and motel tax
Summary: Authorizes the town of Minisink to impose a hotel and motel tax at a rate of five percent.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law, in relation to authorizing the town of Minisink to impose a hotel and motel tax; and providing for the repeal of such provisions upon expiration thereof
